purpose: Test whether the best Phase3CP arm-balanced event_state near-pass can be converted into a valid train reward candidate by reducing turnover through smoothing and related opening-state variants.

phase3cp-low-turnover-event-state-probe.role: generate low-turnover variants around range-location x first-minute-flow motifs, run CA, field gate, true Phase3CM, lineage consistency, and CN feedback memory

verified_runs.result: turnover fell materially but train/validation reward collapsed
single event_state followup appears in small sample but family is frozen because same family also contains CM-negative proxy-high member
the small-sample followup does not survive larger confirmation

hard_rules: do not treat top_quantile sensitivity as alpha proof
do not allow a single-candidate small-sample followup into exploit memory without larger confirmation
family freeze remains valid when a clean candidate shares family with CM-negative proxy-high candidates
Phase3CQ remains blocked until multi-shard CM-positive families survive
next_phase: Broaden fresh candidate generation beyond this motif; require multi-shard confirmation before CN exploit permission
